game.title: Alucar D
game.short_text: Survivor Game on the Car against Vampires

details.title: Alucar D
details.description:
A game inspired by Vampire Survivor, but in a car, where you can run over vampires with your car and burn them with your headlights. 
You are a wandering vampire hunter who has learned that ghouls have taken up residence in the local cemetery. Eliminate the vampires in this town without leaving your car. You will be assisted by a small but effective arsenal of machine guns, holy grenades, and daylight headlights.
Do not stop, run them all over!

game.title: Starcyte
game.short_text: The Last Defender of Stellar Life

details.title: Starcyte
details.description:
The Last Defender of Stellar Life.

You are a Starcyte, the last bastion against the entropic forces of darkness. Venture inside BV33's core, a dying star being invaded by dark enemies.

Re-ignite the star's core by turning on all Star Embers with your Light Harpoon, collect all Helium pickups, and power the Solar Gate to access the Inner Core.Team Name: Bevium
Team Members:Darakuu, ManuelGerardZuccaro, Daniele Calanna, rtorrisi
Game name: Starcyte
Which Theme did you created your game based on?However vast the darkness, we must supply our own light

WASD - MovementMouse - Camera movementLMB - ShootQ - DashE - Backstab your enemiesF - Swap position with your enemiesShift - Change weaponSpace - JumpSpace - Jetpack (while in air)

details.title: The Final Cut
details.description:
Step into "The Final Cut," a retro horror experience where you're the last line of defense in a haunted video rental store. As the night shift clerk, your job is simple: inspect returned VHS tapes for damage and suspicious markings. Accept the clean tapes, reject the damaged ones. But be warned, every tape holds a secret, and accepting the wrong one will unleash paranormal chaos. Can you survive the night, or will the final cut be yours?
Created for the 2025 Epic MegaJam under the theme "Here We Go Again"Download zip file, unzip and run the "TheFinalCut" executable.

game.title: Echo On The Roof
game.short_text: Every signal has a sender. What if it’s you?

details.title: Echo On The Roof
details.description:
Echo On The Roof is a short psychological experience about solitude, memory, and endless return.
You wake up on a ruined rooftop. The wind howls, the radio crackles — and a familiar voice calls out from the static. Searching for a signal, you descend deeper through the crumbling building, slipping between moments that no longer belong to time. Each cycle changes something — the rooms, the sounds, maybe even you.
 
Find the batteries. Tune the signal. Follow the echo. But be careful — some voices should never be found.
1) Download the archive.2) Extract it to any folder you like.3) Run EchoOnTheRoof.exe.4) Play

details.title: Farm Again
details.description:
Welcome to the strangest farm in the world!
You’re a farmer who decided to start a new life in a very suspicious place. Sounds simple enough: raise animals, collect manure, sell it, and get rich. But there’s one small catch…Your animals produce more manure when they’re scared!
So every night, when monsters crawl out from the darkness, you’re not just fighting for your life - you’re fighting for your manure harvest!

Your loyal companions:- Boar - a manure factory! Produces it only when frightened (that is, at night).- Dog - protects the herd and barks at everything that moves (and at some things that don’t).- Cabbage – sometimes appears on the map automatically! It needs to bloom, and once it does, it will automatically explode as soon as an enemy enters its range! To bloom, it requires manure!
Each night the monster waves get stronger, and every third night, a boss arrives who can turn your whole farm upside down!
Morning — time to choose!- After a tough night, you get the chance to pick a new ability that will help you survive longer (and, of course, earn even more money).
Gameplay! It’s simple:- Move!- Shoot!- Buy animals!- Sell manure!- Upgrade your abilities!- Don’t let the monsters kill you!
Features!- A fun TopDown shooter in LowPoly style!- Automatic abilities and simple controls!- Increasingly difficult monster waves!- All sound effects voiced by the developer himself :D!- Humor and chaos guaranteed
Farm Again — where fear makes profits grow!

game.title: Zombie Survive
game.short_text: Survive to the never ending night

details.title: Zombie Survive
details.description: The story begins in the cabin where the protagonist has taken refuge from the zombie apocalypse. The forest is the only safe place, since the cities are overrun with the undead. The cabin is a shelter, but every now and then, it’s necessary to go out in search of food. Today, he plans to go into the forest to gather berries. But first, he needs to get an axe — for that, he’ll have to visit the neighbor down the path and borrow one, because it’s not safe to enter the forest unarmed.Unzip and execute ZombieSurvive.exe

game.title: Kitten Island
game.short_text: UE MegaJam 2025 : Another one bites the Ducks. Find and bite all the 100 ducks out of the island.

details.title: Kitten Island
details.description:
KITTEN ISLAND
- Chase the 100 evil ducks as fast as you can and free your island from the invasion. (20 per area). 
- Try your best to beat your time. 
- Explore the 5 areas of the island. 
- Chill with the fully human made music. 5 Tracks made during the jam for this game, full playlist (listen on youtube)


- Enjoy the colorfull and quack journey in this game specially made to please the 8 yo son of Alien, a kid like we all were one day ! Shoutout to all grown old kids that are reading this and make games :p

WARNING/KNOWN ISSUES :
- There might be a "first duck freeze", the freeze is just a loading process no worry, just wait a bit if so. Apologies for this. (check below)
NOTES
Game made by Alien Creation and SirMadness for a first time doing together and early learning on UE5. Applying for the DUO category of MegaJam 2025.
You might experience bugs as it's a first time. (like first duck freeze)
You might feel the animation a bit swappy: we were surprised by the difference between bipede and animal animations.
Not enough time to learn motion matching for animal properly and it's apparently very difficult, so.. Now we'll know ^^'
Also we did our best with game optimization but it's a learning in progress too.
Still we hope you'll have fun with this peacfull quacky adventure! Thanks for playing!GAME CONTROLS :Keyboard & Gamepad + mouse for options menu (no gamepad support in menu)
GAME FEATURES :
- Kitten that bites ducks
- Pick up that boost and slow speed
- Mini map
- Smooth Camera
- Timer
- Respawn system for swimmers
- 5 Areas to unlock and explore
- 6 100% HumanMade Music (5 themes + 1 Menu)
- Maybe some other stuff that I forget...RESSOURCES DONE BEFORE THE JAM :None.
ASSET PACKS USED from FAB.com :
- Advanced cel shader lite
- Advanced village pack
- Fantastic village ack
- Lootdrop_vfx
- Meleeweaponauravfx
- Stylized forest environment
- Lowpoly stylized game item poison
- Potion B
SUPPORT :
Do not hesitate to leave feedback and your best times! (Dev time is about 8.44 ! Can do better ? :p)

game.short_text: Play as an Airbnb owner and clean up after your guests. They never manage to leave it spotless.

details.title: SuperHost
details.description:

details.title: Tablebots
details.description:
This is a game made for the 2025 Epic MegaJam.
The main theme for this jam was "Here we go again", so we decided to make a game where you literally have to start the level over again in order to complete it. The core mechanic lets you "power off" the Tablebot (Left Shif or Gamepad B Xbox). After doing this you respawn but your previous Tablebot remains in the level, so that you can use its shell to reach the end.Credits:
Andrea Piccolo - Game and Level DesignGiorgio Angiolella - Concept and 3D ArtLeonardo Madia - Game Design and Programming
Sounds collected from Pixabay and Mixkit.
